# Vexlin Bell

A small student who used to fall asleep in class... until she realized it could be her greatest strength.

> **Ancestry:** Goblin
> **Community:** Loreborne
> **Role:** Scholar / Arcanist

## Features

**Channel:** Whenever this ally gains the spotlight, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Drowsiness:** **Spend 2 tokens** to have _Vexlin_ make an adversary within Very Close range [_Asleep_](/mechanics/conditions/).

**Mass Sleep:** **Spend 6 tokens** to have _Vexlin_ make 1d4 adversaries within Far range [_Asleep_](/mechanics/conditions/).
